# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1,
      "maxValue": 20
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "azureuser"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring"
    },
    "virtualNetworkName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dev-vnet"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "default"
    },
    "addressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/16"
    },
    "subnetPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/24"
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_DS2_v2"
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Windows",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Windows",
        "Linux"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "nicNamePrefix": "vmnic",
    "pipNamePrefix": "vmpip",
    "vmNamePrefix": "devvm",
    "networkSecurityGroupName": "dev-nsg",
    "imageWindowsPublisher": "MicrosoftWindowsServer",
    "imageWindowsOffer": "WindowsServer",
    "imageWindowsSku": "2022-datacenter-azure-edition",
    "imageWindowsVersion": "latest",
    "imageLinuxPublisher": "Canonical",
    "imageLinuxOffer": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy",
    "imageLinuxSku": "22_04-lts-gen2",
    "imageLinuxVersion": "latest"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[variables('networkSecurityGroupName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "AllowRDP",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1000,
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "AllowSSH",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1001,
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('virtualNetworkName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIpCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static",
        "publicIPAddressVersion": "IPv4"
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('nicNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('virtualNetworkName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"
              },
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('pipNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('nicNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat(variables('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), createObject('disablePasswordAuthentication', false), json('null'))]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), createObject('publisher', variables('imageWindowsPublisher'), 'offer', variables('imageWindowsOffer'), 'sku', variables('imageWindowsSku'), 'version', variables('imageWindowsVersion')), createObject('publisher', variables('imageLinuxPublisher'), 'offer', variables('imageLinuxOffer'), 'sku', variables('imageLinuxSku'), 'version', variables('imageLinuxVersion')))]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "caching": "ReadWrite",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
            }
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('nicNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]",
              "properties": {
                "primary": true
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmPublicIps": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(1, add(parameters('vmCount'), 1)))]"
    }
  }
}
